title: SEELE kind of sucks
wikitext:
[]: SEELE kind of sucks.             Quote Post by Yue » Thu Jul 14, 2011 11:38 am Sort of investigating what Seele was up to, I'm beginning to suspect that these guys are pretty terrible at what they do, just from the evidence presented in the show. Their top agent is GENDO, for chrissakes. Kaji was able to STEAL ADAM and actually get into Terminal Dogma and show Misato before they sent someone to deal with him, Kaworu was a major factor in how End of Evangelion played out, so it could be said their plan to forward Instrumentality backfired too. Things went "well" for them once Third Impact happened only in the sense that things went out of control in a way they didn't mind. The way I see it, they're like, the worst ancient conspiracy ever. Anything they do fails pretty horribly straight away. I see no evidence that they were able to do ANYTHING right, especially considering Second Impact is entirely their fault. Am I correct or did I entirely miss the point?

[]:             Quote Post by BornIn1142 » Thu Jul 14, 2011 11:41 am You shouldn't say things like that. You shouldn't prod too deeply, or insult the old men. They have eyes everywhere. They'll get you. Just like they got poor Kaji...

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Jul 14, 2011 11:42 am SEELE are as capable as plot demands

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jul 14, 2011 12:09 pm Implying they'll assassinate Fuyutsuki and Yui if they betray Seele with 3I plans? Firing a warning shot past Gendo at Kaji, in exchange for allowing Fuyutsuki return safely? (Due to Adam embryo smuggling and Kaji in general not doing more of their inside-work for them.) Manipulating Ritsuko against Gendo? Screwing over Kaworu? Sending the JSSDF after Nerv once Kiel's patience with his old buddy Gendo completely wore out? I dunno, Seele came across as pretty capable in their ruthless ways to me.

[]: Re: SEELE kind of sucks.             Quote Post by esselfortium » Thu Jul 14, 2011 12:50 pm Yue wrote: Sort of investigating what Seele was up to, I'm beginning to suspect that these guys are pretty terrible at what they do, just from the evidence presented in the show. Their top agent is GENDO, for chrissakes. Kaji was able to STEAL ADAM and actually get into Terminal Dogma and show Misato before they sent someone to deal with him, Kaworu was a major factor in how End of Evangelion played out, so it could be said their plan to forward Instrumentality backfired too. Things went "well" for them once Third Impact happened only in the sense that things went out of control in a way they didn't mind. The way I see it, they're like, the worst ancient conspiracy ever. Anything they do fails pretty horribly straight away. I see no evidence that they were able to do ANYTHING right, especially considering Second Impact is entirely their fault. Am I correct or did I entirely miss the point?

[]:             Quote Post by Yue » Thu Jul 14, 2011 12:53 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Due to Adam embryo smuggling and Kaji in general not doing more of their inside-work for them.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Thu Jul 14, 2011 1:00 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by Yue » Thu Jul 14, 2011 1:21 pm Seele00TextOnly wrote: Of course... Asuka! She must've been the other chief suspect. That's why they unleashed Arael upon her.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Thu Jul 14, 2011 1:37 pm Seele00TextOnly wrote: Of course... Asuka! She must've been the other chief suspect. That's why they unleashed Arael upon her.

[]: Re: SEELE kind of sucks.             Quote Post by sheryl-san » Thu Jul 14, 2011 1:57 pm esselfortium wrote: Now I want to see an NGE comedy of errors following the canon storyline from the perspective of one of Kiel's lackeys.

[]: Re: SEELE kind of sucks.             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Jul 14, 2011 3:05 pm esselfortium wrote: Now I want to see an NGE comedy of errors following the canon storyline from the perspective of one of Kiel's lackeys.

[]: Re: SEELE kind of sucks.             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Thu Jul 14, 2011 8:32 pm esselfortium wrote: Now I want to see an NGE comedy of errors following the canon storyline from the perspective of one of Kiel's lackeys.

Their top agent is GENDO, for chrissakes. Kaji was able to STEAL ADAM and actually get into Terminal Dogma and show Misato before they sent someone to deal with him, Kaworu was a major fact
